name: note
description: Draw the bond as 'Any' (type 8) or 'Single/Aromatic' (type 6) to match aromatic targets; default single bond will skip benzene/furan/etc.

name: methane
description: one atom — negative control; matches nothing

name: ethane
description: single C-C

name: propane
description: single C-C-C

name: ethanol
description: single C-C and C-O (acyclic)

name: methylamine
description: single C-N (acyclic heteroatom)

name: chloromethane
description: single C-Cl (halogen)

name: bromoethane
description: single C-C and C-Br

name: benzene
description: aromatic ring — single-bond C-X queries WILL NOT match

name: cyclohexane
description: single-bonded saturated ring

name: toluene
description: acyclic methyl on aromatic ring; methyl-ring bond is single

name: piperidine
description: saturated ring with N; all single bonds

name: N-methylpiperidine
description: acyclic methyl on ring N; all single bonds

name: furan
description: aromatic ring with O — single-bond C-X queries WILL NOT match

name: chlorobenzene
description: Cl on aromatic ring; C-Cl is single but ring is aromatic

name: methyllithium
description: single C-Li (organolithium)

name: methylmagnesium chloride
description: single C-Mg and Mg-Cl (Grignard)

name: diethylzinc
description: single C-Zn bonds (organozinc)

name: explicit-H methane
description: C has 4 explicit H neighbors only — matches MH/XH/ABH/AHH but NOT M/X/ABC/AHC

name: explicit-H methanol
description: C has 3 explicit H + 1 O — matches ABH (via H), AHH (via H or O), Q/AHC (via O)
